first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning is substantively the same across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate as a strong senior individual contributor who lacks the formal people management experience required for the Engineering Manager role. The minor differences in phrasing (e.g., '12+ years' vs '13+ years', re-wording of strengths/concerns) are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and show no connection to the change in location.
